name: generate-image-agent
description: AI Image Generation Agent — monorepo root

scripts.build: cd web-ui && npm run build && cd ../launcher && pyinstaller --onefile --windowed --name "邻舍.EXE" --icon "assets/icon.ico" --add-data "assets/launchHeader.jpg;assets" --add-data "assets/icon.ico;assets" --add-data "assets/HarmonyOS_Sans_Regular.ttf;assets" --add-data "assets/navbar-title.png;assets" --hidden-import PySide6.QtCore --hidden-import PySide6.QtGui --hidden-import PySide6.QtWidgets --hidden-import PySide6.QtNetwork --clean --noconfirm main.py && copy /Y "dist\邻舍.EXE.exe" "..\邻舍.EXE.exe"
